issuerType: BMA-licensed digital asset business / token administrator
legalStructure: USYC is a digital representation of a share of Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd., described in official sources as a Cayman Islands registered mutual fund. Circle International Bermuda Limited acts as token administrator.
targetInvestors: Eligible non-U.S. institutional investors subject to onboarding, KYC, AML, and wallet permissioning requirements.

classification.classificationNote: USYC is treated as a tokenized fund/share-style short-duration Treasury and repo exposure through Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd. It should be graded with the asset_backed profile because legal structure, backing, custody, reporting, and redemption evidence are central. Custody evidence remains a data gap until verified from official fund documents.

metadata.fundEntity: Hashnote International Short Duration Yield Fund Ltd.
metadata.schemaNote: Prisma schema currently uses prospectuUrl, not prospectusUrl.
openGaps: Public offering memorandum or prospectus was not found.
Exact fund manager / investment manager legal name should be confirmed from fund documents.
Transfer agent name was not publicly verified.
Public custodian or custody arrangement was not verified.
No explicit proof-of-reserves oracle was verified.

_meta.notes: Migrated to the Nexus RWA classification-first standard. Core legal structure, token administrator, minimum investment, performance fee, and fund administrator are source-backed. Prospectus/offering memorandum, transfer agent, exact fund manager, and public custody evidence remain data gaps.
